# nomad_job (Data Source)

Get information on a job ID. The aim of this datasource is to enable you to act on various settings and states of a particular job.

An error is triggered if zero or more than one result is returned by the query.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nomad_job" "example" {
  job_id    = "example"
  namespace = "dev"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `job_id` (String) Job ID

### Optional

- `namespace` (String) Job Namespace

### Read-Only

- `all_at_once` (Boolean) Job All At Once
- `constraints` (List of Object) Job Constraints (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--constraints))
- `create_index` (Number) Create Index
- `datacenters` (List of String) Job Datacenters
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `job_modify_index` (Number) Job Modify Index
- `modify_index` (Number) Modify Index
- `name` (String) Job Name
- `parent_id` (String) Job Parent ID
- `periodic_config` (List of Object) Job Periodic Configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--periodic_config))
- `priority` (Number) Job Priority
- `region` (String) Job Region
- `stable` (Boolean) Job Stable
- `status` (String) Deployment Status
- `status_description` (String) Deployment Status Description
- `stop` (Boolean) Job Stopped
- `submit_time` (String) Job Submit Time
- `task_groups` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--task_groups))
- `type` (String) Job Type
- `update_strategy` (List of Object) The update strategy for rolling updates and canary deployments. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--update_strategy))
- `version` (Number) Job Version

Read-Only:

- `ltarget` (String)

- `rtarget` (String)

- `volumes` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--task_groups--volumes))
